info.title: Adliance.AzureTools
info.description: A few handy common operations for Azure management, like mirroring storage accounts or database.

commands.name: copy-database
commands.description: Copies an existing database (structure and data) to another one. If the target database already exists, it will be overwritten. Please note that this uses SqlPackage and currently only works on Windows.

options.name: --source
options.description:
Required. (Default: ) The connection string to the
source database.

options.name: --target
options.description:
Required. (Default: ) The connection string to the
target database.

options.name: --elastic-pool
options.description:
(Default: ) If set, the target database will be
moved to the specified elastic pool.

options.name: --use-local-bacpac
options.description:
(Default: false) If true and a local BACPAC file
exists, then it will be used instead of downloading
a new one. This is useful if you want to restore a
database often, but not download it all the time.

options.name: --force
options.description:
(Default: false) Force copy-database operation and
skip user confirmation or interaction

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: mirror-local-to-local
commands.description: Copies all subdirectories and files from a local directory to another local directory.

options.name: --source
options.description: Required. (Default: ) The path of the local source directory.

options.name: --target
options.description: Required. (Default: ) The path of the target local directory.

options.name: --delete
options.description:
(Default: true) If true, all files that do not exist in the
source will be deleted from the target.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: mirror-local-to-storage
commands.description: Copies all subdirectories and files from a local directory to an Azure Storage account.

options.name: --source
options.description: Required. (Default: ) The path of the local source directory.

options.name: --target
options.description:
Required. (Default: ) The connection string to the target
storage account.

options.name: --delete
options.description:
(Default: true) If true, all files that do not exist in the
source will be deleted from the target.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: mirror-storage-to-local
commands.description: Copies all containers and blobs from one Azure Storage account to a local directory.

options.name: --source
options.description:
Required. (Default: ) The connection string to the source
storage account.

options.name: --target
options.description: Required. (Default: ) The path of the target local directory.

options.name: --delete
options.description:
(Default: true) If true, all containers and blobs that do not
exist in the source will be deleted from the target.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: mirror-storage-to-storage
commands.description: Copies all containers and blobs from one Azure Storage account to another one.

options.name: --source
options.description:
Required. (Default: ) The connection string to the source
storage account.

options.name: --target
options.description:
Required. (Default: ) The connection string to the target
storage account.

options.name: --delete
options.description:
(Default: true) If true, all containers and blobs that do not
exist in the source will be deleted from the target.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
